title: peepopt.shiftmul: unsound optimization (missing signedness check)
body:
```
$ cat s.v
module top(input [31:0] a, input signed [2:0] x, output [2:0] o);

wire [5:0] t = x * 3;
assign o = a >> t;

endmodule
$ yosys -p "wreduce; eval -set a 32'haaaaaaaa -set x 4; peepopt; eval -set a 32'haaaaaaaa -set x 4" s.v
[...]
3. Executing EVAL pass (evaluate the circuit given an input).
Eval result: \o = 3'000.

4. Executing PEEPOPT pass (run peephole optimizers).
shiftmul pattern in top: shift=$shr$s.v:5$2, mul=$mul$s.v:4$1

5. Executing EVAL pass (evaluate the circuit given an input).
Eval result: \o = 3'010.
[...]
```
